flags.message: The snapshot for evt-petition-disposition is sparse: it has no docket_entries, petition disposition dates, argument date, appeal_from details, or event description. The prediction therefore relies mainly on the attached Supreme Court opinion cluster as a merits-review signal.

The event is labeled as a petition disposition, but the historical Supreme Court snapshot does not identify whether the review vehicle was certiorari, direct appeal, or another jurisdictional path; I interpreted granted as acceptance for merits review.
